title: Eversource Energy to Webcast Third Quarter Results
Eversource Energy: Changing Business Model Brings Opportunities And Risks
text: Eversource Energy is a very large utility in New England that has been undergoing some changes in its business. The company is attempting to sell off its offshore wind projects in order to raise money for debt and some very interesting "green" onshore projects.

title: Aquarion Company Completes the Acquisition of The Torrington Water Company
text: BRIDGEPORT, Conn. , Oct. 3, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Aquarion Company (Aquarion), today announced that it has completed the acquisition of The Torrington Water Company (TWC).
